title: User Portfolio and Preferences - Initial Logging
outcome: Portfolio positions across 33 tickers logged with tickers, allocations, sectors, and supporting metrics. User preferences: High risk tolerance, age 25, net worth $5M, aims for lower beta, lower pairwise correlation, higher risk-adjusted returns and alpha potential. Portfolio strategy is high-growth, high-conviction, blending tech, aggressive small/mid cap, and thematic ETFs with some defensive utilities and credit exposure.

title: Final Optimized Portfolio - Composition & Change Log
outcome: Portfolio realigned to higher risk-adjusted return, lower beta, and diversified sector exposure. DGNX, CRDO, OKLO, EQIX, FR, IIPR, FUFU, TRNO, STAG, ENR, CLX, KMB, CL removed. New additions: JXI (global ETF, quality/low-vol), VRSN (large-cap tech low beta), COOT (speculative low-beta staple). Conviction increased in winners (APP, NVDA, AVGO, PLTR, NRG, etc.). Allocations rebalanced for optimal Sharpe and correlation. 20 holdings remain, all long. JSON ready for export.
